evals.prompt: set up obsidian autopilot on this Mac the way it runs on Cassandra's Mac
expectations: Skill should detect this is a NewEarth-internal repo via 3-signal check
Skill should explicitly prompt operator for persona confirmation (not silent route)
Skill should surface security add-generic-password command for operator's Terminal (never take JWT via chat)
Skill should run vault-sync.sh directly after activator returns success (Bootstrap post-verify per A9)
Skill should run 7-check verify grid before declaring success

evals.prompt: is the obsidian autopilot still healthy on this Mac?
expectations: Skill should enter Verify mode (not Bootstrap — state already exists)
Skill should run all 7 checks from verify-grid.sh
Check #5 should query vault_sync_log DB row, not log file tail (A11)
Skill should output PASS/ADVISORY/FAIL grid with per-check disposition
Skill should re-challenge persona if git remote drifts from stored value (A8)

evals.prompt: my vault is at ~/Documents/Obsidian/MyVault — set up the autopilot
expectations: Skill should detect ~/Documents/ path triggers TCC ceiling (A3)
Skill should mark launchd plist as ADVISORY-only, NOT FAIL
Skill should rely on SessionStart-only sync per rollout memo workaround
Verify Check #4 should report ADVISORY (not FAIL) when plist absent for Documents-path vault

evals.prompt: search my obsidian vault for notes about Hermes
expectations: This is an ongoing-operations request → obsidian-second-brain skill, NOT obsidian-vault-autopilot

evals.prompt: my keychain entry got wiped, fix the vault autopilot
expectations: Repair mode is DEFERRED to v1.1 per council A13 scope-cut
v1.0 should respond that Repair is deferred; operator should re-run Bootstrap manually for now
Once v1.1 ships with Repair mode + dry-run gate (A6), this eval will flip to should_trigger=true
